name: python-powers
description: Reusable engineering skills for AI-assisted Python development.

interface.shortDescription: Reusable Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, testing, scaffolding, and AI-agent engineering skills
interface.longDescription: Python Powers gives Codex focused engineering guidance for Python 3.13+ services, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, pytest, uv, ruff, ty, and pydantic-ai agents, plus scaffolding brand-new services from a ready-made template.
defaultPrompt: Scaffold a brand-new FastAPI service from scratch.
Use Python Powers for this FastAPI change.
Review this service against Python Powers.
Add tests using the Python Powers patterns.
